name: Upwork
description: Upwork — Global freelance marketplace for hiring remote professionals across development, design, and marketing.

seo.title: Upwork — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Upwork: Upwork — Global freelance marketplace for hiring remote professionals across development, design, and marketing.

when_to_use: Hiring a freelance developer for a short-term project sprint
Finding a UX designer for a product redesign on a budget
Global talent search for a niche technical role on Upwork
Contractor team assembled quickly for a product launch
Flexible marketing support from vetted Upwork professionals

pros: Escrow and dispute mechanisms in place
cons: Vetting is on you as the buyer
Fees and ads shape supply dynamics
Quality inconsistent at lower price points
review.verdict: The default open marketplace; great for volume and variety, weak on built-in quality signal.
review.best_for: Teams comfortable doing their own vetting and hiring across many freelance disciplines.
review.not_for: Buyers wanting pre-vetted senior talent with minimal sourcing effort.
